testcase.classname: Playlist Operations Behavior Tests Playlist Loading and Display should display loading state initially
testcase.name: Playlist Operations Behavior Tests Playlist Loading and Display should display loading state initially

testcase.classname: Playlist Operations Behavior Tests Playlist Loading and Display should display all tracks in correct order after loading
testcase.name: Playlist Operations Behavior Tests Playlist Loading and Display should display all tracks in correct order after loading

testcase.classname: Playlist Operations Behavior Tests Playlist Loading and Display should display playlist name and track count
testcase.name: Playlist Operations Behavior Tests Playlist Loading and Display should display playlist name and track count

testcase.classname: Playlist Operations Behavior Tests Playlist Loading and Display should display empty state when playlist has no tracks
testcase.name: Playlist Operations Behavior Tests Playlist Loading and Display should display empty state when playlist has no tracks

testcase.classname: Playlist Operations Behavior Tests Playlist Loading and Display should make GET request to correct endpoint
testcase.name: Playlist Operations Behavior Tests Playlist Loading and Display should make GET request to correct endpoint

testcase.classname: Playlist Operations Behavior Tests Remove Track should remove track from list when remove button is clicked
testcase.name: Playlist Operations Behavior Tests Remove Track should remove track from list when remove button is clicked

testcase.classname: Playlist Operations Behavior Tests Remove Track should make DELETE request to correct endpoint when removing track
testcase.name: Playlist Operations Behavior Tests Remove Track should make DELETE request to correct endpoint when removing track

testcase.classname: Playlist Operations Behavior Tests Remove Track should keep track in list when API returns error
testcase.name: Playlist Operations Behavior Tests Remove Track should keep track in list when API returns error

testcase.classname: Playlist Operations Behavior Tests Remove Track should handle removing the last track
testcase.name: Playlist Operations Behavior Tests Remove Track should handle removing the last track

testcase.classname: Playlist Operations Behavior Tests Drag and Drop Reorder should display drag handles for each track
testcase.name: Playlist Operations Behavior Tests Drag and Drop Reorder should display drag handles for each track

testcase.classname: Playlist Operations Behavior Tests Drag and Drop Reorder should have draggable track items with correct ARIA attributes
testcase.name: Playlist Operations Behavior Tests Drag and Drop Reorder should have draggable track items with correct ARIA attributes

testcase.classname: Playlist Operations Behavior Tests Drag and Drop Reorder should make PATCH request to reorder endpoint when drag completes
testcase.name: Playlist Operations Behavior Tests Drag and Drop Reorder should make PATCH request to reorder endpoint when drag completes

testcase.classname: Playlist Operations Behavior Tests Drag and Drop Reorder should send trackIds array in reorder request body
testcase.name: Playlist Operations Behavior Tests Drag and Drop Reorder should send trackIds array in reorder request body

testcase.classname: Playlist Operations Behavior Tests Playlist Actions Menu should display playlist action menu with edit and delete options
testcase.name: Playlist Operations Behavior Tests Playlist Actions Menu should display playlist action menu with edit and delete options

testcase.classname: Playlist Operations Behavior Tests Track Playback should have play button for each track
testcase.name: Playlist Operations Behavior Tests Track Playback should have play button for each track

testcase.classname: Playlist Operations Behavior Tests Track Playback should have play all button for playlist
testcase.name: Playlist Operations Behavior Tests Track Playback should have play all button for playlist
